scripts.docker: npm run docker-build && dotenv -e .env -- npm run docker-run
scripts.docker-noCache: npm run docker-build-noCache && dotenv -e .env -- npm run docker-run
scripts.db-view: npm run db-start && npx prisma db pull && npx prisma studio
scripts.flask-dev: npm run db-start && node -e "require('child_process').execSync(require('os').platform() === 'win32' ? 'npm run flask-dev:win32' : 'npm run flask-dev:other', { stdio: 'inherit' })"
scripts.flask-dev:other: python3 -m venv ./backend/.venv && . ./backend/.venv/bin/activate && ./backend/.venv/bin/pip3 install -r ./backend/requirements.txt && export DEBUG_MODE='true' && python3 -m flask --app ./backend/index --debug run -p 5222
scripts.flask-dev:win32: python -m venv ./backend/.venv && call ./backend/.venv/Scripts/activate && pip install -r ./backend/requirements.txt && set DEBUG_MODE='true' && python -m flask --app ./backend/index --debug run -p 5222
scripts.__________COMMENT__2__________: MORE HELPERS/SUB-SCRIPTS USED BY THE MAIN SCRIPTS
scripts.dependsON: npm run db-start && npm run flask-dev
scripts.docker-build: npm run db-start && npm run backend-start && docker compose build icv-frontend
scripts.db-start: dotenv -e .env -- docker compose build icv-database && dotenv -e .env -- docker compose up icv-database -d
scripts.backend-start: dotenv -e .env -- docker compose build icv-backend && dotenv -e .env -- docker compose up icv-backend -d
scripts.__________COMMENT__4__________: CLEAN REBUILD OF DOCKER CONTAINERS (NO CACHING)
scripts.docker-build-noCache: dotenv -e .env -- npm run db-start-noCache && npm run backend-start-noCache && dotenv -e .env -- docker compose build icv-frontend --no-cache
scripts.db-start-noCache: dotenv -e .env -- docker compose build --no-cache icv-database && dotenv -e .env -- docker compose up icv-database -d
scripts.backend-start-noCache: dotenv -e .env -- docker compose build --no-cache icv-backend && dotenv -e .env -- docker compose up icv-backend -d
